# Chapter 12: Planetary boundaries and biosphere engineering  (~110 pp)
- 12.1 The planetary-boundaries framework (15) · 12.2 Biogeochemical cycles as engineered domain (15) · 12.3 Biodiversity and ecosystem services (15) · 12.4 Soil at planetary scale (12) · 12.5 Oceans (12) · 12.6 Polar regions and cryosphere (12) · 12.7 Engineering for biosphere health (15) · 12.8 Failure section: nutrient-cycle failures, fisheries collapse, ozone (the success), PFAS (the failure) (14)
